title: BEM-845 diagnose lint blockers
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/state','governance/reports','governance/tasks/pending','governance/handoff','governance/transport']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-23 | 09:26 (UTC+3)'
def read(p):
    p=Path(p)
    return p.read_text(errors='ignore') if p.exists() else ''
def load(p):
    p=Path(p)
    try: return json.loads(p.read_text(errors='ignore')) if p.exists() else {}
    except Exception as exc: return {'_load_error':str(exc)}
# Collect recent BEM-84x states/reports and workflow dispatch/result evidence.
items=[]
for root in ['governance/state','governance/reports','governance/codex/results','governance/tasks/pending','governance/workflow_dispatch_results']:
    rp=Path(root)
    if rp.exists():
        for p in sorted(rp.glob('*')):
            if p.is_file() and any(x in p.name.lower() for x in ['bem842','bem843','bem844','bem845','dispatch','workflow']):
                items.append({'path':str(p),'preview':read(p)[:1200]})
runner=read('.github/workflows/codex-runner.yml')
lint=read('scripts/workflow_lint_gate.py')
proc=read('scripts/process_workflow_dispatch_queue.sh')
commit=read('scripts/commit_workflow_dispatch_results.sh')
checks={
 'codex_runner_exists': Path('.github/workflows/codex-runner.yml').exists(),
 'lint_gate_exists': Path('scripts/workflow_lint_gate.py').exists(),
 'queue_processor_exists': Path('scripts/process_workflow_dispatch_queue.sh').exists(),
 'commit_results_exists': Path('scripts/commit_workflow_dispatch_results.sh').exists(),
 'runner_has_queue_processor': 'process_workflow_dispatch_queue' in runner,
 'processor_handles_invalid_json': 'invalid_json' in proc and 'json.tool' in proc,
 'commit_tracks_invalid_queue': 'workflow_dispatch_queue_invalid' in commit,
}
# Diagnose likely issue from known screenshot: lint-gate failure, not codex execution failure.
if not checks['runner_has_queue_processor']:
    status='runner_queue_processor_missing'
    next_action='patch codex-runner to include queue processor step'
elif not checks['processor_handles_invalid_json']:
    status='processor_not_hardened_against_bad_json'
    next_action='patch processor to quarantine malformed queue JSON'
elif not checks['commit_tracks_invalid_queue']:
    status='commit_results_not_tracking_invalid_queue'
    next_action='patch commit script to commit dispatch results and invalid queue quarantine'
else:
    status='lint_gate_failure_needs_exact_rule_extract'
    next_action='extract workflow-lint-gate rule output from repo artifacts or patch lint-gate compatibility for processor changes'
state={'bem':'BEM-845','status':status,'checks':checks,'evidence_items':items[-30:],'next_action':next_action,'created_at':created}
Path('governance/state/bem845_diagnose_latest_lint_gate_blockers.json').write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/reports/bem845_diagnose_latest_lint_gate_blockers.md').write_text('# BEM-845 | Diagnose Latest Lint Gate Blockers | '+status+sep+sep+json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem845_next.md').write_text('Next: '+next_action+sep+'Operator relay forbidden. Report does not stop development.'+sep)
Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md').write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-845'+sep+sep+'Status: '+status+sep+'Next: '+next_action+sep)
with Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl').open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h: h.write(json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
changed_files.extend(['governance/state/bem845_diagnose_latest_lint_gate_blockers.json','governance/reports/bem845_diagnose_latest_lint_gate_blockers.md','governance/tasks/pending/bem845_next.md','governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md','governance/transport/results.jsonl'])
ops_applied.append('Diagnosed latest Workflow Lint Gate blockers around BEM-842/BEM-844 and selected next repair step')
"""
No issue comments.
